recipes.title: Shrikhand
steps: Process is very important for Shrikhand
Start with adding all sugar to Chakka, mix and keep it aside for 8 hours
Mix every few hours motive is that sugar should get dissolved
Once all sugar is dissolved take a muslin cloth or maida sieve
Which means Latthe ka kapda ya Maide ki Chalni (Stainless Steel)
Tie it on top of bowl or keep chalni on top of bowl
Add small mix to top and strain using silicon spatula (easier with spatula)
Once all mixture passes through, add kesar, Gulab jal and nutmeg

recipes.title: Khopra Pak
steps: Add Mawa and sugar to it.
Mix till sugar dissolves and heat it a bit.
Add Khopra Bura towards the end and mix vigorously.
Add Milk 1-2 tsp if mixture seems too dry (it depends on quality of mawa)
Apply bit of ghee to a square dish and add mixture to it for setting in.
Once settled, sprinkle some saffron water on top for look and flavor.
